name: One-Page Business Plan
tagline: Problem to financials, on one page — no 40-page document nobody reads.
differentiator: Lean-canvas structure means you can actually finish it in an afternoon, and anyone you hand it to can read it in two minutes.
description: A lean, one-page business plan covering problem, solution, target market, revenue model, competitive advantage, financial snapshot, and milestones — structured as a grid, not a document you'll abandon halfway through.
whoFor: First-time founders who want a plan they'll actually finish and actually use — not a document that exists to look thorough.
